title: 高中没毕业的杀人犯狱中自学数学，发表重磅论文，寻求减刑被否决 | 原文
content: Christopher Havens, a high school dropout serving a 25-year murder sentence in Washington state, taught himself advanced mathematics in prison without computers or internet access. He published peer-reviewed pure mathematics research and became an affiliate researcher at UCLA while attempting to reform prison education. Despite receiving unanimous parole board recommendations for sentence reduction, the governor denied his request, preventing his early release.
eventKey: 高中没毕业的杀人犯狱中自学数学-发表重磅论文-寻求减刑被否决

title: 17岁恶女飙车撞墙杀男友！庭上装失忆躲过死刑，入狱后竟骄奢放纵每天炫耀杀过人？ | 原文
content: A 17-year-old Ohio girl killed her boyfriend and another passenger by crashing a speeding car into a wall. In court, she claimed amnesia from a rare medical condition, avoiding the death penalty but receiving life without parole for 15 years. Netflix later released a documentary, *The Crash*, in which she maintained her innocence as a victim of medical circumstance, misleading audiences about her role in the fatal incident.
eventKey: 17岁恶女飙车撞墙杀男友-庭上装失忆躲过死刑-入狱后竟骄奢放纵每天炫耀杀过人

title: UK media fails to disclose defence sector links in nearly 60% of cases
content: UK media outlets fail to disclose defence sector links in nearly 60% of cases, according to an analysis. The report highlights a significant lack of transparency when journalists or publications have financial or professional connections to the defence industry, raising concerns about potential conflicts of interest in military and security reporting.
eventKey: media-fails-disclose-defence-sector-links

title: 实现芯片设计验证自动化，提升开发效率10倍以上，「智维创芯」完成数千万元天使轮融资｜36氪首发
content: Chinese startup Zhiwei Chuangxin, founded in 2025 by Southeast University professor Wang Xi, has raised tens of millions of yuan in angel funding for its AI-powered chip verification platform. Its product ChatDV automates digital chip verification tasks—test generation, assertion creation, reference modeling, and debugging—boosting development efficiency over 10x, cutting cycles by 50%, and reducing costs by 33%. The team previously used GPT-3.5 to generate a RISC-V processor. Core founders hail from Southeast University, Tsinghua, and City University of Hong Kong.

title: AI Eats the World? A Reality Check with Benedict Evans
content: Tech analyst Benedict Evans discusses AI's current state with Erik Torenberg, examining coding agents, foundation models, infrastructure spending, and software economics. Evans explains why coding became AI's first breakout use case, uses previous platform shifts to contextualize the present moment, and notes that fundamental questions about AI remain unresolved. The conversation explores whether AI models will capture value themselves or serve as infrastructure for future applications, alongside topics of enterprise adoption, consumer behavior, and software's future evolution.

title: JPEG XL 十年：Google 开源实验如何塑造下一代图像编码标准
content: 互联网建立在图像之上，但图像编码的带宽与画质之争从未停止。在 JPEG 成为互联网图片标准二十多年后，Google 的一个研究团队用十年时间，通过一系列看似分散的开源项目，最终端出了 JPEG XL——一个被预期能用三十年的图像编码方案。 从理解现有技术开始：2011…

title: 千问向第三方 Agent、Skill 全面开放
content: Alibaba's Qianwen AI app will open to third-party agents and skills, allowing all enterprises to operate branded agents on the platform. First-batch companies including Luckin Coffee, KFC, Mixue Ice Cream, and China Eastern Airlines are testing agent services. Businesses can customize agent personas and service boundaries, offering conversational product services with memory and proactive planning capabilities for reminders and recommendations.
eventKey: 千问向第三方-agent-skill-全面开放
normalizedTitle: 千问向第三方 agent skill 全面开放

title: 里昂：腾讯推出微信 AI Agent 只是时间问题，有望在今年内实现
content: Lyons predicts Tencent will launch a WeChat AI Agent in 2024, with testing underway and compliance procedures potentially starting this month. The AI Agent would help 1.4 billion users complete tasks within the app. Tencent's WeChat ecosystem—400 million mini-programs, 1 billion users—gives it superior competitive advantages over Apple iOS, requiring over a decade to replicate. Tencent's stock, down 20% this year due to AI capability concerns, could revalue if these worries prove overblown. 2024 profits will grow on strong gaming, advertising, and expanding margins.
eventKey: 腾讯推出微信-agent-只是时间问题-有望在今年内实现
normalizedTitle: 里昂 腾讯推出微信 ai agent 只是时间问题 有望在今年内实现
